observations.correspondence_rationale: The phrase 'Formless void, darkness on the deep' directly echoes the description of the earth in Genesis 1:2 before creation begins, indicating a deliberate allusion to the primordial state of creation.
observations.summary: The text explicitly alludes to the primordial state of the earth as described in Genesis 1:2, emphasizing the formless void and darkness over the deep before the first words of truth were spoken, paralleling the biblical creation narrative.

evidence.quote: Formless void, darkness on the deep—as things must have been before Time, when the first words of truth were spoken.
